name: Lutron Caseta
description: Control Lutron Caseta lighting: activate scenes, toggle Smart Away, inspect devices/areas/occupancy via the lutron CLI.

bridgeHost.description: Bridge IP or hostname (overrides lutron-cli config)

cliPath.label: CLI Path
cliPath.help: Path or command name for the lutron binary. Install via `pipx install lutron-cli`.

bridgeHost.label: Bridge Host
bridgeHost.help: IP of your Smart Bridge (e.g. 192.168.1.50). Leave blank to use the lutron-cli config default.
